expectations.evidence: Output uses bold markdown sections (Progress, Vendor, Key risk) — no MEMORANDUM FOR, FROM, DATE, or SUBJECT headers
BLUF appears as a bold paragraph, not as numbered section '1. BLUF.' — numbered structure not used at all
Bold BLUF line reads: '...go-live moves from 15 June to 6 July...'
BLUF line ends with '...leadership sign-off on the revised timeline is required'
'Action required: Leadership must approve the revised timeline.' — no specific name or role assigned as owner
Output opens directly with the bold BLUF line — no meta-commentary
